parameters.name: get_weather
parameters.description: Current weather and daily forecast for a city: temperature, feels-like, conditions, precipitation amount and probability, wind and gusts, UV index, sunrise/sunset, snowfall. Parameters: city (required), days (optional, 1-16, default 3)

schema.description: City name for the weather query

parameters.name: get_hourly_forecast
parameters.description: Hour-by-hour weather forecast for a city: temperature, feels-like, rain probability and amount, conditions, wind, UV, humidity, cloud cover. Parameters: city (required), hours (optional, next 1-48 hours, default 24), date (optional, YYYY-MM-DD within the next 16 days, returns that full day instead)

value.date: ={{ $fromAI('date', 'Specific date YYYY-MM-DD within the next 16 days (overrides hours)', 'string') }}

schema.description: Specific date YYYY-MM-DD within the next 16 days (overrides hours)

parameters.name: get_air_quality
parameters.description: Current model-based air quality and pollen for a city: European and US AQI, PM2.5, PM10, ozone, NO2, SO2, UV index, and pollen levels (alder, birch, grass, mugwort, olive, ragweed; pollen data Europe only). Parameter: city (required)

value.city: ={{ $fromAI('city', 'City name for the air quality query', 'string') }}

schema.description: City name for the air quality query

parameters.name: get_weather_history
parameters.description: Historical daily weather for a city from the archive (data since 1940): conditions, min/max temperature, precipitation, wind. Parameters: city, start_date, end_date (YYYY-MM-DD, past dates only, max 31 days per call; the archive lags about 5 days behind)

schema.description: City name for the historical query
End date YYYY-MM-DD (max 31 days after start_date)

parameters.name: get_marine_weather
parameters.description: Sea/marine conditions for a coastal location: current wave height, wave direction, wave period, sea surface temperature, plus a daily max-wave forecast. Parameters: city (required, must be coastal), days (optional, 1-7, default 3)

parameters.name: get_weather_alerts
parameters.description: Official weather warnings for a European city from national weather services (MeteoAlarm; Germany via DWD/Bright Sky). Returns active alerts matching the city/region, or a country-level summary. Parameter: city (required). Europe only

value.city: ={{ $fromAI('city', 'City name to check for weather warnings', 'string') }}

schema.description: City name to check for weather warnings
